jobs.title: Assistant Professor of Audio Production
jobs.description: MFA or doctorate in audio/media production (by June 2027), demonstrated expertise in digital audio workstation software (Pro Tools preferred), studio recording/mixing or sound design experience, success or potential in undergraduate teaching, record of scholarship/creative activity.

jobs.title: A1 (Broadcast Audio Engineer)
jobs.description: Experience in live television/streaming production, live audio mixing, Dante and RTS systems, LiveU and remote contribution platforms, operation of digital audio consoles, strong troubleshooting and client-facing skills.

jobs.title: Audio Engineer
jobs.description: 3+ years production sound mixer or boom operator experience; proficiency with industry gear; knowledge of timecode sync and on-location mixing; valid driver's license and ability to lift gear.

jobs.title: Assistant Audio Engineer
jobs.description: Studio mixing/editing and dialog post-production for broadcast and digital platforms; Pro-Tools proficiency; valid Texas driver\u000fs license; bachelor\u000fs degree or equivalent experience; 1-3 years experience preferred; must be a Christian; able to lift 25 lbs and work scheduled/extended shifts.

jobs.title: Lead Sound Designer
jobs.location: Frisco or Montréal or Quebec City or Georgia
jobs.description: 7+ years of professional game audio experience with at least one shipped title; proven sound design, mixing, editing, documentation, and leadership skills; ability to implement audio into Wwise and UE5 and collaborate across teams.

jobs.title: Principal Sound Designer
jobs.description: 8+ years games industry sound design experience, shipped AAA titles, expertise in Wwise and real-time audio systems, experience with audio implementation, recording source material, collaborating with engineers, and mentoring teammates.

jobs.company: Loyola High School of Los Angeles
jobs.title: Hannon Theatre- Lightening & Sound Designer
jobs.description: Design, program, implement, and supervise lighting and sound for two annual productions; collaborate with director and production team over a full season.
